name: NorthIsle Copper and Gold Inc.
description: NorthIsle Copper and Gold Inc. is a copper-gold developer advancing the North Island Project, a large porphyry copper-gold deposit situated on a 34,000-hectare land package near Port Hardy on northern Vancouver Island, British Columbia. The project is adjacent to the former BHP Island Copper Mine and hosts two significant deposits discovered since 2021. The company is in the development stage, focused on resource expansion and economic studies.
